defaultLang.description: ISO 639-1 language code for the plan UI (e.g. en, he)

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. USD, EUR, ILS)

estimatedAdults.description: Estimated number of adult participants for this plan

estimatedKids.description: Estimated number of child participants for this plan

myParticipantId.description: On GET /plans only: the authenticated user's participant row id for this plan (for leave-plan and client routing without loading full participants)

myRole.description: On GET /plans only: the authenticated user's role on this plan

contactPhone.description: Plan owner phone number in E.164 format. Used for WhatsApp notifications (e.g. join request alerts).

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. USD, EUR, ILS)

estimatedAdults.description: Estimated number of adult participants for this plan

estimatedKids.description: Estimated number of child participants for this plan

defaultLang.description: ISO 639-1 language code (e.g. en, he). Send null to clear.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. USD, EUR, ILS). Send null to clear.

estimatedAdults.description: Estimated number of adult participants. Send null to clear.

estimatedKids.description: Estimated number of child participants. Send null to clear.

isAllParticipants.description: True when this item is assigned to all participants. When a new participant joins the plan, they are automatically added to items with this flag.

assignmentStatusList.description: Per-participant assignment and status tracking (replaces the old top-level status field). Each entry is { participantId, status } where status is one of: pending, purchased, packed, canceled. Response visibility: owner/admin sees full list; non-owner sees only their own entry.

category.description: Item category. "equipment" is accepted as a legacy alias for "group_equipment".

assignmentStatusList.description: Owner-only on create. Send the full desired assignment list. Assign all: include every participant and set isAllParticipants=true. Assign subset/single: include only those participants and keep isAllParticipants=false (or omit it). Unassigned item: omit this field or send [].

isAllParticipants.description: Owner-only on create. true means this item is for all participants and new participants should be auto-added later. false (or omitted) means regular assignment list behavior.

category.description: Item category. "equipment" is accepted as a legacy alias for "group_equipment".

assignmentStatusList.description: PATCH behavior depends on caller role. Owner/admin: send the full desired list (replaces current list). Non-owner: send exactly one entry for yourself only (for status update or self-assign); backend merges it with current list. If using unassign=true, do not send assignmentStatusList.

isAllParticipants.description: Owner/admin only. true marks item as "assign to all participants" and future participants are auto-added. false removes that mode.

unassign.description: Participant self-unassign helper. Set true to remove your own entry from assignmentStatusList. Cannot be combined with assignmentStatusList in the same request.

dietaryMembers.description: Per-person dietary preferences for each adult/kid in this participant group. Replaces the legacy foodPreferences/allergies text fields for new clients.

contactPhone.description: Phone number in E.164 format. A WhatsApp invitation with a deep link to the plan will be sent to this number on creation.

dietaryMembers.description: Per-person dietary preferences. Optional on create — send to populate structured dietary data for the participant group.
Per-person dietary preferences. Send null to clear. Partial updates are not supported — send the full members array each time.

defaultLang.description: ISO 639-1 language code for the plan UI (e.g. en, he)

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. USD, EUR, ILS)

estimatedAdults.description: Estimated number of adult participants for this plan

estimatedKids.description: Estimated number of child participants for this plan

dietaryMembers.description: Per-person dietary preferences carried from the join request.

contactPhone.description: Phone number in E.164 format. When a join request is created, a WhatsApp notification is sent to the plan owner.

dietaryMembers.description: Per-person dietary preferences for this join request. Optional — carried through to the participant record on approval.
Per-person dietary preferences for this participant group. Null if not yet set.
Per-person dietary preferences. Send null to clear. Send the full members array each time — partial updates are not supported.
Per-person dietary preferences after the update.

category.description: Item category. "equipment" is accepted as a legacy alias for "group_equipment".
Item category. "equipment" is accepted as a legacy alias for "group_equipment".

assignmentStatusList.description: Invite/guest PATCH rule: send only your own entry (participantId must be your participant) to update status or self-assign. Backend merges into the full assignment list.

unassign.description: Set true to remove your own assignment entry from this item. Cannot be combined with assignmentStatusList in the same request.

category.description: Item category. "equipment" is accepted as a legacy alias for "group_equipment".

assignmentStatusList.description: Same rules as single-item PATCH. Owner/admin sends full desired list. Non-owner sends only their own single entry; backend merges.

isAllParticipants.description: Owner/admin only. true enables assign-to-all mode; false disables it.

unassign.description: Participant self-unassign helper for bulk PATCH. Set true to remove your own entry. Cannot be combined with assignmentStatusList.

assignmentStatusList.description: Same invite/guest rule as single PATCH: each item may include only your own single assignment entry; backend merges into full list.

unassign.description: Bulk self-unassign helper. Set true to remove your own assignment entry. Cannot be combined with assignmentStatusList.

phone.description: Normalized phone number (E.164 format). Synced from Supabase via POST /auth/sync-profile.

preferredLang.description: Preferred UI language. null means not explicitly set — client should fall back to geo-detection.

foodPreferences.description: Free-text dietary preferences, e.g. "vegetarian, no shellfish"

allergies.description: Free-text allergy list, e.g. "nuts, gluten, dairy"

defaultEquipment.description: List of equipment item names the user typically brings on trips, e.g. ["tent", "sleeping bag", "headlamp"]

preferences.description: App preferences for this user. Null if the user has never saved preferences.

phone.description: Phone number. Will be normalized to E.164 format before storage. Send null to clear.

preferredLang.description: Preferred UI language. Send null to clear (revert to geo-detection). Allowed: he, en.

foodPreferences.description: Free-text dietary preferences, e.g. "vegetarian, no shellfish". Send null to clear.

allergies.description: Free-text allergy list, e.g. "nuts, gluten, dairy". Send null to clear.

defaultEquipment.description: List of equipment item names the user typically brings. Send null to clear.

participantId.description: The participant who made this expense

amount.description: Expense amount as a decimal string (e.g. "29.99"). Stored as numeric(10,2) in the database.

description.description: Optional description of what the expense was for

itemIds.description: List of item IDs associated with this expense. Empty array if no items linked.

totalAmount.description: Sum of all expenses for this participant

def-62.description: All expenses for a plan plus per-participant totals. Currency is defined on the plan itself.
def-62.title: ExpensesResponse

participantId.description: The participant this expense belongs to

description.description: Optional description of what the expense was for

itemIds.description: Optional list of item IDs this expense is for. All items must belong to the same plan.

amount.description: Updated expense amount (must be greater than 0)

itemIds.description: Updated list of item IDs. Replaces the existing list entirely. All items must belong to the same plan.

def-67.title: SendListBody
def-67.description: Request body for sending a plan item list via WhatsApp. Use "recipient" to choose who receives the list and "listType" to filter items.

recipient.description: Who should receive the list. "self" sends to the caller's own phone. "all" sends to every non-owner participant (owner-only). A specific participantId sends to that participant.

listType.description: Which items to include. "full" = all items, "buying" = pending assignments, "packing" = purchased assignments, "unassigned" = no assignments.

def-68.title: SendListResponse
def-68.description: Unified response after attempting to send an item list via WhatsApp.

sent.description: Number of messages successfully queued for delivery.

failed.description: Number of messages that failed to send.

userId.description: Supabase user UUID of the identified registered user.

displayName.description: Display name resolved from the participant record.

def-71.description: Chatbot-facing plan summary. Field names are simplified (name/date instead of title/startDate). completedItemCount counts items where every assignment entry has status packed or purchased.

date.description: Plan start date in ISO 8601 (maps to plans.startDate). Null if not set.

role.description: The resolved user's role in this plan.

participantCount.description: Total number of participants on the plan.

itemCount.description: Total number of items on the plan.

completedItemCount.description: Items where assignmentStatusList is non-empty and every entry has status packed or purchased.

def-71.title: InternalPlanSummary

plans.description: Plans the user is a member of that are undated or have startDate at or after now (UTC); past-dated plans are omitted. Ordered by creation date (oldest first).

def-73.description: Participant row in internal plan detail.

name.description: displayName if set, otherwise first name plus last name.

def-73.title: InternalPlanDetailParticipant

def-74.description: Item row for chatbot. status reflects the calling user only. category maps DB enums to gear or food.

status.description: Calling user assignment: done if packed or purchased, else pending (including no entry).

assignee.description: Display names of assignees from assignmentStatusList, or null if isAllParticipants or list empty.

category.description: group_equipment and personal_equipment map to gear.

def-74.title: InternalPlanDetailItem

date.description: Plan start date ISO 8601, or null.

role.description: Calling user role on this plan.

def-77.description: Chatbot status: done maps to purchased in assignmentStatusList; pending maps to pending.

status.description: Target status for the calling user on this item.

def-77.title: InternalUpdateItemStatusBody

type.description: Whether this group member is an adult or a kid

index.description: 0-based index within the member type (adult 0, adult 1, kid 0, etc.)

diet.description: Single food preference for this person

allergies.description: List of allergies for this person. Use ["none"] or [] for no allergies.

members.description: Per-person dietary data for each adult/kid in this participant group. Each entry has a type (adult|kid), a 0-based index within that type, a single diet preference, and an allergies list.

id.description: Primary key of this usage log row

featureType.description: Which AI feature produced this usage record

planId.description: Plan associated with this AI call (null for non-plan features)

userId.description: Supabase UUID of the user who triggered the AI call

sessionId.description: Browser session id from X-Session-ID when present — correlates with sessions table for analytics

modelId.description: Bare model id from the provider SDK (e.g. claude-haiku-4-5-20251001), matching Vercel AI `model.modelId`

status.description: Outcome: success (all items valid), partial (salvaged from failed parse), error (generation failed)

estimatedCost.description: Estimated cost in USD as a decimal string (e.g. "0.004800"). Null if model pricing is unknown.

durationMs.description: Wall-clock time of the AI call in milliseconds

promptLength.description: Character count of the assembled prompt

promptText.description: Full prompt string sent to the model

resultCount.description: Number of results returned (e.g. item suggestions count)

errorMessage.description: Error message when status is error

errorType.description: SDK error class name (e.g. AI_NoObjectGeneratedError, AI_APICallError); null on success or partial

finishReason.description: Model finish reason from the provider SDK — stop, length, content-filter, error, or unknown

rawResponseText.description: Raw model output: serialised JSON array on success, raw text on partial/error (error.text), null when unavailable

createdAt.description: When the AI call finished and this row was written (ISO 8601)

featureType.description: AI feature type (same enum as on each log row)

count.description: Number of log rows for this feature within the filter

totalCost.description: Sum of estimated costs for this feature (USD), null if unknown

modelId.description: Bare model id (same as on each log row)

count.description: Number of log rows for this model within the filter

totalCost.description: Sum of estimated costs for this model (USD), null if unknown

totalRequests.description: Total number of AI requests matching the filters

totalInputTokens.description: Sum of input tokens across matching rows

totalOutputTokens.description: Sum of output tokens across matching rows

totalEstimatedCost.description: Sum of estimated costs in USD

userId.description: Filter by user who triggered the AI call

from.description: Filter by created after this date (ISO 8601)

to.description: Filter by created before this date (ISO 8601)

def-90.description: Paginated AI usage logs with aggregated summary. Admin only.

total.description: Total count of records matching filters (for pagination)

def-90.title: AiUsageResponse

id.description: Primary key of this chatbot AI usage row

planId.description: Plan id when the call is plan-related

chatType.description: Whether the chatbot turn was DM or group

messageIndex.description: Zero-based message index within the session

toolCalls.description: Tool names invoked in this turn

toolCallCount.description: Total tool calls in this turn

totalTokens.description: Total tokens when reported by the provider

estimatedCost.description: Estimated cost in USD as a decimal string; null if pricing unknown

durationMs.description: Wall-clock duration of the AI call in milliseconds

errorMessage.description: Error message when status is error

count.description: Number of rows for this model within the filter

totalCost.description: Sum of estimated costs for this model (USD)

count.description: Number of rows for this chat type within the filter

toolName.description: Tool name from flattened tool_calls arrays

count.description: Occurrences of this tool name within the filter

totalRequests.description: Number of chatbot AI rows matching the filters

totalEstimatedCost.description: Sum of estimated costs in USD

from.description: Include rows with created_at on or after this instant

to.description: Include rows with created_at on or before this instant

def-98.description: Paginated chatbot AI usage with aggregates. Admin only. Table is written by the chatbot service.
def-98.title: ChatbotAiUsageResponse

Omit assignment fields to create unassigned item.

Non-owner: send only your own assignment entry to update status or self-assign, or send unassign=true to remove yourself. patch.description: Update multiple items at once. Each item is validated independently. No top-level status field exists; use assignmentStatusList per item. Owner/admin uses full-list replace semantics and may set isAllParticipants. Non-owner sends only their own assignment entry per item (merge semantics) or unassign=true. Response for non-owners is filtered to their own assignment entries.

get.summary: Access a plan via invite link
get.description: Public endpoint. Validates the invite token and returns plan data with items. Items are filtered to only those assigned to the guest or unassigned. Each item's assignmentStatusList is filtered to show only the guest's own entry. Participant PII is stripped — only displayName and role are included. There is no top-level status on items — check assignmentStatusList for per-participant status.

schema.description: Plan and items returned for the invite token

patch.description: Allows a guest to update their per-plan preferences (display name, group size, dietary info) using the invite token in the URL. All fields are optional — send only what changed. Send null to clear a field.

post.description: Creates a new item (no top-level status field). Equipment items default to pcs; food items require a unit. personal_equipment defaults to isAllParticipants=true and assignmentStatusList is populated for all plan participants when the list is omitted. Only the plan owner can set assignments on create via authenticated routes.

patch.summary: Update an item as a guest via invite token
patch.description: Updates an existing item for the invite participant. Allowed only when item is currently unassigned or assigned to this participant; returns 403 if assigned only to others. No top-level status field exists. To update status or self-assign, send assignmentStatusList with your own single entry. To remove yourself, send unassign=true (without assignmentStatusList). Response is filtered to your own assignment entry.

patch.description: Updates multiple items for the invite participant. No top-level status field exists. For each item, send assignmentStatusList with your own single entry to update status/self-assign, or send unassign=true to remove yourself. Updates are allowed only for items currently unassigned or assigned to this participant. Response returns each item's assignmentStatusList filtered to the caller entry.

get.summary: List all expenses for a plan with per-participant totals
get.description: Returns every expense entry for the plan plus a summary array with the total amount per participant.

401.description: Authentication required — JWT token missing or invalid

schema.description: Authentication required — JWT token missing or invalid

404.description: Plan not found or access denied

schema.description: Plan not found or access denied

post.summary: Add an expense to a plan
post.description: Create a new expense entry for a participant. Owner/admin can add expenses for any participant; linked participants can only add expenses for themselves.

400.description: Bad request — check the message field for details

schema.description: Bad request — check the message field for details

401.description: Authentication required — JWT token missing or invalid

schema.description: Authentication required — JWT token missing or invalid

404.description: Plan or participant not found

patch.description: Update an existing expense. Owner/admin can update any expense; the participant it belongs to can update their own.

400.description: Bad request — check the message field for details

schema.description: Bad request — check the message field for details

401.description: Authentication required — JWT token missing or invalid

schema.description: Authentication required — JWT token missing or invalid

404.description: Expense not found

delete.description: Delete an expense. Owner/admin can delete any expense; the participant it belongs to can delete their own.

401.description: Authentication required — JWT token missing or invalid

schema.description: Authentication required — JWT token missing or invalid

404.description: Expense not found

post.summary: Send the item list for a plan via WhatsApp
post.description: Sends a formatted item list for the specified plan via WhatsApp. Use "recipient" to control who receives the list: "self" sends to the caller, "all" sends to every non-owner participant (owner-only), or pass a specific participantId. Use "listType" to filter items: "full" (default), "buying", "packing", or "unassigned". When recipient is "all" with buying/packing, items are filtered per-participant. Requires JWT authentication.

401.description: Authentication required

404.description: Plan not found

post.summary: Generate AI item suggestions for a plan
post.description: Uses AI to generate a list of suggested packing/food items based on plan context (dates, location, tags, participants). Output language is determined by the plan defaultLang field (en, he, es). JWT required. Must be a participant.

401.description: Authentication required — JWT token missing or invalid

schema.description: Authentication required — JWT token missing or invalid

404.description: Not found — plan does not exist

schema.description: Not found — plan does not exist

get.summary: Admin: list AI usage logs with summary
get.description: Returns paginated AI usage logs (newest first), the total row count matching filters for pagination, and aggregated summary totals (tokens, estimated cost, breakdowns by feature and model). Requires a valid JWT; the user must be an admin. Use query parameters to filter by plan, user, feature, status, and time range.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Filter by user who triggered the AI call

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Filter by created after this date (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Filter by created before this date (ISO 8601)

200.description: Paginated logs, total count for the current filters, and summary aggregates

schema.description: Paginated logs, total count for the current filters, and summary aggregates

401.description: Authentication required — JWT token missing or invalid

schema.description: Authentication required — JWT token missing or invalid

get.summary: Admin: list chatbot AI usage with summary
get.description: Returns paginated rows from chatbot_ai_usage (newest first), total count for pagination, and aggregates including per-model, per-chat-type, and per-tool-name counts. The underlying table is written by the chatbot service; this route is read-only. Requires admin JWT.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Include rows with created_at on or after this instant

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Include rows with created_at on or before this instant

200.description: Paginated logs, total count for filters, and summary aggregates

schema.description: Paginated logs, total count for filters, and summary aggregates

401.description: Authentication required — JWT token missing or invalid

schema.description: Authentication required — JWT token missing or invalid

post.summary: Resolve a WhatsApp phone number to a Chillist user
post.description: Identifies a registered user by their phone number. Returns the Supabase userId and display name. Returns 404 if the phone is not linked to any registered Chillist account.

200.description: Supabase user id and display name for the phone number

schema.description: Supabase user id and display name for the phone number

401.description: Missing or invalid x-service-key

404.description: No registered user linked to this phone number

get.summary: List future or undated plans for the chatbot user
get.description: Returns a chatbot-friendly summary of plans the user is a member of (owner, participant, or viewer) where startDate is null or startDate is at or after the current time (UTC). Plans with a start date in the past are omitted. Requires x-service-key and x-user-id headers. completedItemCount counts items where every assignment entry has status packed or purchased.

200.description: Plans the user belongs to with counts and roles

schema.description: Plans the user belongs to with counts and roles

401.description: Missing x-user-id, invalid x-service-key, or user could not be resolved

schema.description: Missing x-user-id, invalid x-service-key, or user could not be resolved

get.summary: Get full plan detail for chatbot
get.description: Returns plan metadata, all participants, and all items with chatbot-facing fields. Requires x-service-key and x-user-id. Caller must be a participants row for this plan. Item status reflects the calling user only.
